tasks: Company orientation. (Remember to bring two forms of ID and your I-9 form.)
Attend Company orientation.
After orientation is over, call or text your buddy who will walk with you to Company.
Receive your laptop, badge, and phone.
Log onto your Mac and change your root password.
Connect to Company’s secure network
Change your ENT (enterprise) password. This is your password for signing into systems administered by Company, including your email, calendar, and Google Drive.
Sign into your work email
Set up Company’s 2FA so that you can access your work email from anywhere.
Set up Slack, our chat program, so that you can communicate with your colleagues
Add your contact information to the Company Staff Contact Document
Schedule a virtual tea with two coworkers
Receive necessary software licenses
Learn about Company Org Chart and team structure
Confirm your HR system account
Complete required compliance trainings
Fill out your Individual Development Plan.
Learn about Company Offsites
Ask to be added to team collaboration tools
After receiving your work phone, set up 2FA.
Pick up badge
Set up GitHub account.
Set up VPN.
Set up printer
Sign up for listservs that interest you.
Meet with your director
Write your bio and submit a picture for the Company website
Add yourself to the Team API
Company Employee Benefits and Information
Company Onboarding Document
I-9 - Employment Eligibility Verification
W-4 - Tax Withholding
State Tax Withholding Forms
ECI - Emergency Contact Information
Health Benefits Election Form
Life Insurance Election Form
Designation of Beneficiary Form
Receive email from Team Talent and your buddy about your first week.
Read up on Company and Company orientation.
Send bio (3-5 lines) and preferred gender pronoun to your buddy.
Orientation classes begin. You will be taking a variety of Slack-based classes in the #Company-classes channel with your cohort
Make sure your Macbook is secure
Double check to make sure you have access to Company Calendars and double check your inbox to make sure you've received a note from Company-team@Company.gov.
Read your Office Guide to learn more about where you work
Attend Company’s weekly all-hands meeting
Fill out transit subsidy, if you commute via public transportation to work.
Make sure your Slack avatar and Google avatar contain a picture
